claims.text: A 2026 benchmark of 253,817 inbound B2B leads found the median company takes 42 hours to respond, with 35% taking over 24 hours
Leads answered within 5 minutes convert at 21% vs 2.3% for 24+ hour responses, a 900% swing
Black Arrow's free Response Audit scores response speed, leads lost, and revenue at risk

disclosure: Audit mechanics (inputs, score, leads-lost estimate, revenue-at-risk output) and the sub-60-second SMS capability are Black Arrow's own verified tool functions. The 17% figure is presented as a qualified industry benchmark citation, not a Black Arrow-measured statistic, and the original unearned '$250 value' claim was removed.

claims.text: The Lead Response Audit takes four inputs (monthly leads, average job value, response speed, response method) and returns a response score, leads lost estimate, and revenue at risk
Industry benchmarks suggest only 17% of service businesses respond to new leads within an hour
Black Arrow fires an SMS to every new lead in under 60 seconds, automatically
Owners often see mismatched revenue numbers across ad accounts, CRMs, and spreadsheets.
The Black Arrow platform unifies CRM, texting, booking, reviews, and reporting into one login.
